summary:
Under the Transplantation of Human Organs Act, only specific healthcare professionals like the medical superintendent, treating physicians, and neurologists/neurosurgents are authorized to certify brainstem death. Doctors who are part of the organ donation or transplantation team—such as a liver transplant surgeon—are expressly excluded from participating in this process due to conflicts of interest related to their involvement in organ retrieval decisions.  

Final Answer: \boxed{D}

Doctors who are part of the organ donation or transplantation team—such as a liver transplant surgeon—are expressly excluded from participating in this process due to conflicts of interest related to their involvement in organ retrieval decisions.  

Final Answer: \boxed{D}. Answer choice: D
